positive: A minimalist, symmetrical illustration of a stylized celestial body, featuring a prominent crescent moon nestled within a ring of gentle, swirling galaxies. The composition should be designed for a central apparel print, utilizing deep indigo blues, ethereal gold leaf accents, and soft silver gradients. Include abstract, organic stellar dust trails and interconnected geometric planetary orbits. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and ethereal cosmic vaporwave, creating a clean silhouette with strong negative space. High contrast and vibrant luminosity, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric.
